name: ASUS PRIME B650-PLUS ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x PCIe 4.0 x16 - Support DDR4-6400+(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - Vertical M.2 slot (Key E) - USB 3.2 Gen 2 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Realtek 2.5GbE LAN - Thunderbolt (USB4) Header
shortName: ASUS PRIME B650-PLUS ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x PCIe 4.0 x16
description: ATX B650 motherboard for AMD AM5 socket with DDR4 support and premium connectivity features.
